title: Knighy's Mystical Creatures
description: Loads of ridiculous mobs, items, bosses and more! Best of all, this is a community based mod! Lots of things to explore!
body:
THIS MOD MIGHT HAVE BUGS! SO PLEASE REPORT ANY BUGS IN THE DISCORD!
(Feel free to stay also! We have sneak peaks, updates and plenty more too!)

WARNING! THIS MOD IS NOT COMPATIBLE WITH OPTIFINE!

IF YOUR GAME CRASHES IT IS PROBABLY OPTIFINE'S FAULT

(ALTERNATIVES COULD BE Rubidium, Sodium, etc.)

sorry for the inconvenience...



(C'mon, you'll at least get sneak peaks and updates)

Welcome to the ridiculous mod of Knighy's Mystical Creatures, with a plethora of strange to mystifying beings, mysteries and INSANELY UNIQUE BOSSES just awaiting your discovery! If you'd like to learn more, join our DISCORD!

~THIS MOD IS MAINLY ABOUT MOBS AND BOSSES!~

THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib

SERIOUSLY DOWNLOAD IT!

(literally won't work without it..)

Now to present you the main course.

------- SPOILERS AHEAD -------

(obviously.)

(Heads up! Not every mob on this page! Only a few so you can get a taste!)

This bag came to life of result of some black magic, and as of it, carries objects lost by previous people and mobs! They spawn in dark places and are called the "Raggied" and next to it is the "Astropi" a bird civilization that lives in the skies and in trees. They are immune to lightning!

(he looks unamused because he didn't want to do this)

These mobs travel in packs in high areas and are very territorial. These are called "Spooks", and next to them is the "Super Spook", harnessing the power of lightning itself!

Think it looks goofy? This hungry little creature is called the "Rabble", and next to it is the Stitchling — a plush-like creature that's oddly cute.

This carnivorous beast cocoons its prey in silk before devouring them. It's called the "Colostula".

This shy snake is called the "Schiper", and next to it is the plant "Gulgeena".

One thing you must have noticed is that we love expression and mobs with personality!

I can't say it, the big N will get angry...

So let's say they're close to Pals! There are LOTS more to see!

(Join our DISCORD for more information)

(And shout-out to our #1 tester! Madi Grahamcracker!)
